observables.name: cosmological_box_run_health
observables.measurement: final heavy diagnostics bundle for phase3_cosmo_box_ps_high
observables.reference_target: run health invariants in diagnostics schema v1

observables.name: zoom_run_health
observables.measurement: final heavy diagnostics bundle for phase3_zoom_validation
observables.reference_target: same run-health invariants as cosmological run

observables.name: power_spectrum_consistency
observables.measurement: relative L2 between runtime heavy-diagnostic P(k) outputs when available, otherwise deterministic in-repo mesh-consistency floor (mesh_n=8 vs mesh_n=12)
observables.reference_target: higher diagnostic mesh result on identical cosmological state, or deterministic checked-in reference floor when the runtime-heavy lane is not present

observables.name: halo_force_potential_profiles
observables.measurement: tree radial force profile and potential estimate vs softened direct-sum reference
observables.reference_target: softened direct summation with identical epsilon_comoving

observables.name: hierarchical_stepping_time_integration_accuracy
observables.measurement: two-body leapfrog energy drift sampled at bin-indexed dt levels

observables.name: strong_scaling_baseline
observables.measurement: PM-only and tree-only max-rank step time from np1 and np2 MPI runs
observables.reference_target: no superiority claim; baseline throughput table only

observables.name: weak_scaling_baseline
observables.measurement: np1 and np2 with particle balance metadata
observables.reference_target: bounded local load imbalance and transparent rank max timing

observables.name: external_science_calibration_contract
observables.measurement: named external target manifest for cosmological P(k) and halo-profile comparison campaigns
observables.reference_target: explicit literature-facing calibration contract required before claiming external science agreement

tolerance_envelope.forbidden_claim: no external agreement claim without generated comparison artifacts
